spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative pb-24 shadow-2xl bg-stone-50 overflow-hidden
spacing_and_layout.cards: rounded-3xl border border-stone-200/50 bg-white p-6 shadow-sm
spacing_and_layout.bottom_navigation: fixed bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-md h-20 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-stone-200 flex justify-around items-center px-4 z-50

buttons.primary: w-full bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-2xl py-4 font-semibold text-base hover:bg-stone-800 transition-colors shadow-md
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-700 rounded-2xl py-4 font-semibold text-base hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors
buttons.fab: absolute bottom-6 right-6 w-14 h-14 bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform
buttons.action_split: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl py-3 px-6 font-semibold

inputs.text: w-full bg-stone-50 border-0 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-stone-900 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-stone-200 focus:bg-white transition-all placeholder:text-stone-400
inputs.currency: text-4xl font-extrabold text-stone-900 text-center bg-transparent border-none outline-none focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-stone-300 w-full

badges.paid: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.owed: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.split: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

bottom_sheet.handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-stone-200 rounded-full mx-auto mb-6

icons.usage: Use icons heavily in the bottom nav, lists, and for expense categories (Home, ShoppingBag, Coffee, Zap).

images.description: 3D illustration of a house with floating coins for the welcome/onboarding screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a Mobile-Web experience using pure React (NOT React Native Expo). All files must be .js (.jsx) inside the React project. Do not use .tsx.
Wrap the main layout in a container with 'max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-stone-50 relative pb-24 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden' to strictly simulate a mobile app on desktop.

Implement a fixed bottom navigation bar ('fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-stone-200 z-50') containing links/icons to Dashboard, Add Expense, Debts, and Profile.
Use Shadcn UI Drawer (Bottom Sheet) for the 'Add Expense' flow to avoid context switching and maintain a mobile app feel.
Mock all data locally inside the components. Mock multiple roommates (using the avatars), their balances, and a list of recent household expenses.
The UI must prioritize the requested colors: Green (text-emerald-600) for receiving/positive, Red (text-rose-600) for owing/debt, and Blue (text-blue-600) for neutral/total.
Ensure 'Quem deve quem' (Who owes whom) is immediately visible on the dashboard using a horizontal scroll or tight list.
Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'DM Sans' for body text.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Do NOT build a traditional desktop layout. Treat the `max-w-md` container as the absolute boundaries of the viewport.
